title: Thoughtbox Spec Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter contract for .specs/**/*.md. Claims are referenced in PR descriptions as <spec_id>:<claim_id> (e.g. SPEC-CONTROL-PLANE:c1).

spec_id.description: Globally unique spec identifier, e.g. SPEC-CONTROL-PLANE or SPEC-GW-011

date.description: ISO 8601 date when the spec was authored or last materially updated

branch.description: Git branch this spec was authored on, if applicable

claims.description: Falsifiable claims this spec makes. PR claims reference these as spec_id:claim_id.

id.description: Claim identifier, unique within this spec, e.g. c1

statement.description: What is being claimed, in plain language

type.description: implementation: code exists; behavioral: system does X; governance: process enforced; performance: measurable metric

behavioral.description: If true, verifying this claim requires agentic_test or human_attestation evidence in the PR description.

required_evidence.description: Plain-language description of what evidence must exist to verify this claim

links.description: Related specs, archived decisions, or implementation paths
